generation.prompt: A minimalist professional avatar icon for an AI financial research agent. Centered design: a glowing rosetta compass rose shape constructed from golden circuit-board traces and geometric data lines, on a deep navy blue background (#0a1628). The 8 compass arms radiate outward with subtle candlestick chart patterns embedded in them, representing global financial markets. Outer ring has faint world map longitude lines. Color palette: deep navy background, gold (#f0c040) primary lines, electric blue (#4fc3f7) accent glows. Clean flat design, geometric precision, subtle soft glow on the central rosette, no text, no letters, professional logo-style icon suitable as a square avatar.

Professional product showcase card for an AI financial research agent. Dark navy background (#0d1b2a). Top left: small gold compass rose icon. Title in white: 'Investment Thesis: AAPL'. Subtitle: 'US Equities Desk · Groq Llama-3.3-70B'. Large bold green badge: 'LONG'. Below: confidence bar showing 87% filled in gold, labeled 'Confidence: 0.87'. Time horizon: '90 days'. Three analyst cards in a row: 'Fundamental Analyst', 'Technical Analyst', 'Sentiment Analyst' each with a short 1-line summary text in light grey. Bottom: IPFS CID in monospace font in electric blue. Clean fintech UI style, no gradients, sharp edges, professional.

Professional infographic showing 5 regional trading desks for an AI financial research agent. Dark navy background. Title at top: 'Five Regional Desks. Five Languages.' in white. Five horizontal cards stacked, each with flag emoji, region name, model name, and language badge: 1) US Equities - Groq Llama-3.3-70B - English 2) China A-Shares - DeepSeek V4 Pro - Chinese 3) EU Equities - Gemini 2.5 Flash - English 4) Japan Equities - Gemini 2.5 Flash - Japanese 5) Crypto - Groq Llama-3.3-70B - English. Each card has a subtle candlestick chart sparkline on the right. Gold accent colors, clean sans-serif typography, professional fintech style.

Professional architecture diagram for an AI agent pipeline. Dark navy background (#0d1b2a). Title: 'How It Works' in white. Clean left-to-right flow diagram with 5 steps connected by arrows: Step 1 box 'API Request' with ticker icon, Step 2 'Data Pull' with database icon, Step 3 'Three Analyst Agents' with three small parallel boxes labeled Fundamental / Technical / Sentiment, Step 4 'Portfolio Synthesis' with merge arrow, Step 5 'IPFS Pin + Response' with chain link icon. Arrows in electric blue, boxes in dark slate with gold borders. Clean flat design, no shadows, professional fintech infographic style.

Professional trust and provenance showcase card for a financial AI agent. Dark navy background. Title: 'Every thesis. Permanently verified.' in white bold. Center: two provider logos side by side labeled 'Pinata' and 'Storacha / Filecoin' connected by an equals sign showing matching CIDs. Below: a monospace CID hash string in electric blue. Bottom section: 'Dual-provider IPFS quorum. Identical CID across both providers. Tamper-evident audit trail for every research output.' in light grey small text. Green checkmark badge: 'Cryptographically Verified'. Clean fintech security/trust visual, gold and blue accents on navy.
